subtitle: Privacy-preserving Bilibili links
lead: Expand a Bilibili link, remove tracking parameters, and share the destination without the extra baggage.
url_help: Short and full Bilibili URLs are supported.
param_details_desc: Parameters found in the expanded destination before B23 Rust cleaned it.
footer_text: Inspired by b23.wtf. B23 Rust resolves links through its server-side allowlist and retains only supported destination parameters.
status_clipboard_error: The clipboard could not be read.
status_empty_url: Enter a Bilibili URL to clean it.
status_clean_error: The link could not be cleaned.
status_invalid_url_error: The service returned an invalid cleaned URL.
status_copy_unavailable: Copying is unavailable in this browser.
status_copy_error: The clean link could not be copied.
status_share_error: The clean link could not be shared.
param_no_params: No parameters were found in the expanded destination.
